017package org.apache.juneau.petstore.dto;
018
019import java.util.*;
020
021/**
022 * Pet domain bean.
023 *
024 * <p>
025 * Represents a pet for sale in the petstore.
026 *
027 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
028 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauPetstoreOverview">juneau-petstore</a>
029 * </ul>
030 */
031public class Pet {
032
033   private long id;
034   private Species species;
035   private String name;
036   private float price;
037   private List<String> tags;
038   private PetStatus status;
039   private String photo;
040
041   /**
042    * Returns the pet ID.
043    *
044    * @return The pet ID.
045    */
046   public long getId() {
047      return id;
048   }
049
050   /**
051    * Sets the pet ID.
052    *
053    * @param value The new value.
054    * @return This object.
055    */
056   public Pet setId(long value) {
057      id = value;
058      return this;
059   }
060
061   /**
062    * Returns the species of the pet.
063    *
064    * @return The species of the pet.
065    */
066   public Species getSpecies() {
067      return species;
068   }
069
070   /**
071    * Sets the species of the pet.
072    *
073    * @param value The new value.
074    * @return This object.
075    */
076   public Pet setSpecies(Species value) {
077      species = value;
078      return this;
079   }
080
081   /**
082    * Returns the name of the pet.
083    *
084    * @return The name of the pet.
085    */
086   public String getName() {
087      return name;
088   }
089
090   /**
091    * Sets the name of the pet.
092    *
093    * @param value The new value.
094    * @return This object.
095    */
096   public Pet setName(String value) {
097      name = value;
098      return this;
099   }
100
101   /**
102    * Returns the price of the pet.
103    *
104    * @return The price of the pet.
105    */
106   public float getPrice() {
107      return price;
108   }
109
110   /**
111    * Sets the price of the pet.
112    *
113    * @param value The new value.
114    * @return This object.
115    */
116   public Pet setPrice(float value) {
117      price = value;
118      return this;
119   }
120
121   /**
122    * Returns the tags associated with the pet.
123    *
124    * @return The tags associated with the pet.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
125    */
126   public List<String> getTags() {
127      return tags;
128   }
129
130   /**
131    * Sets the tags associated with the pet.
132    *
133    * @param value The new value.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
134    * @return This object.
135    */
136   public Pet setTags(List<String> value) {
137      tags = value;
138      return this;
139   }
140
141   /**
142    * Returns the lifecycle status of the pet.
143    *
144    * @return The lifecycle status of the pet.
145    */
146   public PetStatus getStatus() {
147      return status;
148   }
149
150   /**
151    * Sets the lifecycle status of the pet.
152    *
153    * @param value The new value.
154    * @return This object.
155    */
156   public Pet setStatus(PetStatus value) {
157      status = value;
158      return this;
159   }
160
161   /**
162    * Returns the URI of the pet photo.
163    *
164    * @return The URI of the pet photo.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
165    */
166   public String getPhoto() {
167      return photo;
168   }
169
170   /**
171    * Sets the URI of the pet photo.
172    *
173    * @param value The new value.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
174    * @return This object.
175    */
176   public Pet setPhoto(String value) {
177      photo = value;
178      return this;
179   }
180}
